#!/bin/bash
set -e
LOG_FILE="/tmp/k8s_install.log"
exec > >(tee -a ${LOG_FILE}) 2>&1

# 接收环境变量 K8S_VERSION，用于安装指定版本
K8S_VERSION=${K8S_VERSION:-""}

# ==================================================
# [新增函数] 检查并安装指定的包 (仅限 CentOS/RHEL)
# ==================================================
install_if_missing() {
    local package=$1
    if ! command -v "$package" &> /dev/null; then
        echo ">>> 警告: $package 未找到，正在尝试安装..."
        if yum install -y "$package"; then
            echo ">>> $package 安装成功。"
        else
            echo "!!! 致命错误: $package 安装失败，退出脚本。"
            exit 1
        fi
    fi
}

echo ">>> [0/6] 检查依赖工具 (wget)..."
if [ -f /etc/redhat-release ]; then
    install_if_missing wget
else
    echo "非 CentOS/RHEL 系统，跳过依赖检查..."
fi

echo ">>> [1/6] 修复 CentOS 7 EOL 源问题 (切换阿里云源)..."
# 检测是否为 CentOS 7
if grep -q "CentOS Linux 7" /etc/release 2>/dev/null || grep -q "CentOS Linux release 7" /etc/redhat-release 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "检测到 CentOS 7，正在替换废弃的官方源为阿里云镜像..."

    # 1. 备份旧源
    #if [ ! -f /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo.backup ]; then
     #   mv /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo.backup || true
    #fi

    # 2. 下载阿里云源 (如果 curl 失败，尝试用 wget)
   # curl -o /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo https://mirrors.aliyun.com/repo/Centos-7.repo || \
    #wget -O /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo https://mirrors.aliyun.com/repo/Centos-7.repo

    # 3. 容错处理：如果下载失败，尝试修改本地配置指向 vault
    #if [ ! -f /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo ]; then
    #    echo "下载失败，尝试修改本地配置..."
    #    [ -f /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo.backup ] && cp /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo.backup /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo
    #    sed -i 's/mirrorlist/#mirrorlist/g' /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo
    #    sed -i 's|#baseurl=http://mirror.centos.org|baseurl=http://mirrors.aliyun.com/centos-vault|g' /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo
    #fi

    # 4. 生成缓存
    #yum clean all
    #yum makecache
else
    echo "非 CentOS 7 系统或未识别，跳过源修复..."
fi

echo ">>> [2/6] 初始化系统配置 (Swap/SELinux/Firewall)..."
swapoff -a
sed -i '/swap/d' /etc/fstab
setenforce 0 || true
sed -i 's/^SELINUX=enforcing$/SELINUX=permissive/' /etc/selinux/config || true
systemctl stop firewalld || true
systemctl disable firewalld || true

echo ">>> [3/6] 加载内核模块 & 参数..."
cat <<EOF | tee /etc/modules-load.d/k8s.conf
overlay
br_netfilter
EOF
modprobe overlay
modprobe br_netfilter

cat <<EOF | tee /etc/sysctl.d/k8s.conf
net.bridge.bridge-nf-call-iptables  = 1
net.bridge.bridge-nf-call-ip6tables = 1
net.ipv4.ip_forward                 = 1
EOF
sysctl --system

echo ">>> [4/6] 安装 Containerd (阿里云源)..."
if [ -f /etc/redhat-release ]; then
    # 安装依赖
    yum install -y yum-utils device-mapper-persistent-data lvm2

    # --- Docker 源配置及容错 START ---
    DOCKER_REPO_SUCCESS=0

    # 1. 尝试配置阿里云 Docker 源
    echo "尝试配置阿里云 Docker 源..."
    #if yum-config-manager --add-repo https://mirrors.aliyun.com/docker-ce/linux/centos/docker-ce.repo; then
    #    DOCKER_REPO_SUCCESS=1
    #    echo ">>> Docker 源配置: 使用阿里云源成功。"
    #else
    #    echo "!!! 警告: 阿里云 Docker 源配置失败。尝试切换到官方 Docker 源..."
#
    #    # 2. 容错：切换到官方 Docker 源
    #    if yum-config-manager --add-repo https://download.docker.com/linux/centos/docker-ce.repo; then
    #        DOCKER_REPO_SUCCESS=1
    #        echo ">>> Docker 源配置: 使用官方源成功。"
    #    else
    #        echo "!!! 致命错误: 官方 Docker 源配置也失败。退出安装 Containerd。"
    #        exit 1
    #    fi
    #fi
    # --- Docker 源配置及容错 END ---
    yum-config-manager --add-repo https://download.docker.com/linux/centos/docker-ce.repo
    # 3. 刷新缓存并安装 Containerd
    echo "尝试安装 containerd.io..."
    yum makecache # 确保最新的 repo metadata 被缓存

    INSTALL_CONTAINERD_CMD="yum install -y containerd.io"

    # [新增容错] 如果第一次安装失败 (可能是网络问题导致元数据下载中断)，清理缓存后再次尝试
    if ! ${INSTALL_CONTAINERD_CMD}; then
        echo "!!! 警告: Containerd 第一次安装失败。清理缓存后重试..."
        yum clean expire-cache # 清理过期的 repo 元数据
        yum makecache

        if ! ${INSTALL_CONTAINERD_CMD}; then
            echo "!!! 致命错误: Containerd 第二次安装失败，退出脚本。"
            exit 1
        fi
    fi

    mkdir -p /etc/containerd
    containerd config default > /etc/containerd/config.toml
    # 开启 SystemdCgroup
    sed -i 's/SystemdCgroup = false/SystemdCgroup = true/' /etc/containerd/config.toml
    # 使用阿里云镜像仓库加速 sandbox_image
    sed -i 's|registry.k8s.io|registry.aliyuncs.com/google_containers|g' /etc/containerd/config.toml

    systemctl restart containerd
    systemctl enable containerd
else
    echo "仅支持 CentOS/RHEL 系统自动安装，跳过 Containerd 安装..."
fi

echo ">>> [5/6] 安装 Kubeadm/Kubelet (阿里云源/官方源)..."
if [ -f /etc/redhat-release ]; then

    K8S_REPO_FILE="/etc/yum.repos.d/kubernetes.repo"

    # === 关键修改：提取主要版本号 (例如 1.30.14 -> 1.30) ===
    K8S_MAJOR_VERSION=""
    if [ -n "$K8S_VERSION" ]; then
        # 使用 grep -oE 提取 X.Y 部分
        K8S_MAJOR_VERSION=$(echo $K8S_VERSION | grep -oE '^[0-9]+\.[0-9]+')
        if [ -z "$K8S_MAJOR_VERSION" ]; then
            echo "!!! 警告: 无法从版本 $K8S_VERSION 提取主要版本，将使用完整版本作为源路径。"
            K8S_MAJOR_VERSION="$K8S_VERSION"
        fi
    fi
    # ======================================================


    # 1. 尝试配置阿里云 K8s 源
    echo "尝试配置阿里云 Kubernetes Yum 源..."
    cat <<EOF > ${K8S_REPO_FILE}
[kubernetes]
name=Kubernetes
baseurl=https://mirrors.aliyun.com/kubernetes/yum/repos/kubernetes-el7-x86_64/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0
repo_gpgcheck=0
EOF

    # 检查安装命令
    if [ -n "$K8S_VERSION" ]; then
        VERSION_PKG="-${K8S_VERSION}-0"
        INSTALL_CMD="yum install -y kubelet${VERSION_PKG} kubeadm${VERSION_PKG} kubectl${VERSION_PKG} --disableexcludes=kubernetes"
        echo "将安装 Kubernetes 指定版本: ${K8S_VERSION}"
    else
        INSTALL_CMD="yum install -y kubelet kubeadm kubectl --disableexcludes=kubernetes"
        echo "未指定 Kubernetes 版本，将安装最新可用版本。"
    fi

    # 2. 执行安装，如果失败，进行容错 (切换到官方源)
    INSTALL_SUCCESS=0
    if ${INSTALL_CMD}; then
        INSTALL_SUCCESS=1
    else
        echo "!!! 警告: 尝试阿里云源安装失败 ($?). 切换到官方 Google 源..."

        # 容错：切换到新的官方 pkgs.k8s.io 源
        # 使用提取出的 K8S_MAJOR_VERSION 构造源路径
        K8S_OFFICIAL_REPO_URL="https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v${K8S_MAJOR_VERSION}/rpm/"
        K8S_OFFICIAL_GPG_KEY="https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v${K8S_MAJOR_VERSION}/rpm/repodata/repomd.xml.key"

        cat <<EOF > ${K8S_REPO_FILE}
[kubernetes]
name=Kubernetes (Official - ${K8S_MAJOR_VERSION})
baseurl=${K8S_OFFICIAL_REPO_URL}
enabled=1
gpgcheck=1
repo_gpgcheck=1
gpgkey=${K8S_OFFICIAL_GPG_KEY}
exclude=kubelet kubeadm kubectl cri-tools kubernetes-cni
EOF

        yum clean all
        yum makecache

        # 再次尝试安装
        if ${INSTALL_CMD}; then
            INSTALL_SUCCESS=1
        else
            echo "!!! 错误: 尝试官方源安装也失败 ($?). 请检查网络和版本兼容性。"
            INSTALL_SUCCESS=0
        fi
    fi

    if [ ${INSTALL_SUCCESS} -eq 1 ]; then
        systemctl enable --now kubelet
    else
        # 安装失败，必须退出，防止后续 kubeadm join 失败
        echo "Kubernetes 组件安装失败，无法继续。"
        exit 1
    fi
fi

echo ">>> [6/6] 环境准备完成！"]0;root@test1:~[root@test1 ~]#

#!/bin/bash
set -e
LOG_FILE="/tmp/k8s_install.log"
exec > >(tee -a ${LOG_FILE}) 2>&1

# 接收环境变量 K8S_VERSION，用于安装指定版本
K8S_VERSION=${K8S_VERSION:-""}

# ==================================================
# [新增函数] 检查并安装指定的包 (仅限 CentOS/RHEL)
# ==================================================
install_if_missing() {
    local package=$1
    if ! command -v "$package" &> /dev/null; then
        echo ">>> 警告: $package 未找到，正在尝试安装..."
        if yum install -y "$package"; then
            echo ">>> $package 安装成功。"
        else
            echo "!!! 致命错误: $package 安装失败，退出脚本。"
            exit 1
        fi
    fi
}

echo ">>> [0/6] 检查依赖工具 (wget)..."
if [ -f /etc/redhat-release ]; then
    install_if_missing wget
else
    echo "非 CentOS/RHEL 系统，跳过依赖检查..."
fi

# 检测是否为 CentOS 7
if grep -q "CentOS Linux 7" /etc/release 2>/dev/null || grep -q "CentOS Linux release 7" /etc/redhat-release 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "检测到 CentOS 7，正在替换废弃的官方源为阿里云镜像..."

    # 1. 备份旧源
    #if [ ! -f /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo.backup ]; then
     #   mv /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo.backup || true
    #fi

    # 2. 下载阿里云源 (如果 curl 失败，尝试用 wget)
   # curl -o /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo https://mirrors.aliyun.com/repo/Centos-7.repo || \
    #wget -O /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo https://mirrors.aliyun.com/repo/Centos-7.repo

    # 3. 容错处理：如果下载失败，尝试修改本地配置指向 vault
    #if [ ! -f /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo ]; then
    #    echo "下载失败，尝试修改本地配置..."
    #    [ -f /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo.backup ] && cp /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo.backup /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo
    #    sed -i 's/mirrorlist/#mirrorlist/g' /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo
    #    sed -i 's|#baseurl=http://mirror.centos.org|baseurl=http://mirrors.aliyun.com/centos-vault|g' /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo
    #fi

    # 4. 生成缓存
    #yum clean all
    #yum makecache
else
    echo "非 CentOS 7 系统或未识别，跳过源修复..."
fi

echo ">>> [2/6] 初始化系统配置 (Swap/SELinux/Firewall)..."
swapoff -a
sed -i '/swap/d' /etc/fstab
setenforce 0 || true
sed -i 's/^SELINUX=enforcing$/SELINUX=permissive/' /etc/selinux/config || true
systemctl stop firewalld || true
systemctl disable firewalld || true

echo ">>> [3/6] 加载内核模块 & 参数..."
cat <<EOF | tee /etc/modules-load.d/k8s.conf
overlay
br_netfilter
EOF
modprobe overlay
modprobe br_netfilter

cat <<EOF | tee /etc/sysctl.d/k8s.conf
net.bridge.bridge-nf-call-iptables  = 1
net.bridge.bridge-nf-call-ip6tables = 1
net.ipv4.ip_forward                 = 1
EOF
sysctl --system

echo ">>> [4/6] 安装 Containerd (阿里云源)..."
if [ -f /etc/redhat-release ]; then
    # 安装依赖
    yum install -y yum-utils device-mapper-persistent-data lvm2

    # --- Docker 源配置及容错 START ---
    DOCKER_REPO_SUCCESS=0

    # 1. 尝试配置阿里云 Docker 源
    echo "尝试配置阿里云 Docker 源..."

    #        exit 1
    #    fi
    #fi

    # 3. 刷新缓存并安装 Containerd

    yum makecache # 确保最新的 repo metadata 被缓存

    INSTALL_CONTAINERD_CMD="yum install -y containerd.io"

    # [新增容错] 如果第一次安装失败 (可能是网络问题导致元数据下载中断)，清理缓存后再次尝试
    if ! ${INSTALL_CONTAINERD_CMD}; then
        echo "!!! 警告: Containerd 第一次安装失败。清理缓存后重试..."
        yum clean expire-cache # 清理过期的 repo 元数据
        yum makecache

        if ! ${INSTALL_CONTAINERD_CMD}; then
            echo "!!! 致命错误: Containerd 第二次安装失败，退出脚本。"
            exit 1
        fi
    fi

    mkdir -p /etc/containerd
    containerd config default > /etc/containerd/config.toml
    # 开启 SystemdCgroup
    sed -i 's/SystemdCgroup = false/SystemdCgroup = true/' /etc/containerd/config.toml
    # 使用阿里云镜像仓库加速 sandbox_image
    sed -i 's|registry.k8s.io|registry.aliyuncs.com/google_containers|g' /etc/containerd/config.toml

    systemctl restart containerd
    systemctl enable containerd
else
    echo "仅支持 CentOS/RHEL 系统自动安装，跳过 Containerd 安装..."
fi

echo ">>> [5/6] 安装 Kubeadm/Kubelet (阿里云源/官方源)..."
if [ -f /etc/redhat-release ]; then

    K8S_REPO_FILE="/etc/yum.repos.d/kubernetes.repo"

    # === 关键修改：提取主要版本号 (例如 1.30.14 -> 1.30) ===
    K8S_MAJOR_VERSION=""
    if [ -n "$K8S_VERSION" ]; then
        # 使用 grep -oE 提取 X.Y 部分
        K8S_MAJOR_VERSION=$(echo $K8S_VERSION | grep -oE '^[0-9]+\.[0-9]+')
        if [ -z "$K8S_MAJOR_VERSION" ]; then
            echo "!!! 警告: 无法从版本 $K8S_VERSION 提取主要版本，将使用完整版本作为源路径。"
            K8S_MAJOR_VERSION="$K8S_VERSION"
        fi
    fi
    # ======================================================


    # 1. 尝试配置阿里云 K8s 源
    echo "尝试配置阿里云 Kubernetes Yum 源..."
    cat <<EOF > ${K8S_REPO_FILE}
[kubernetes]
name=Kubernetes
baseurl=https://mirrors.aliyun.com/kubernetes/yum/repos/kubernetes-el7-x86_64/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0
repo_gpgcheck=0
EOF

    # 检查安装命令
    if [ -n "$K8S_VERSION" ]; then
        VERSION_PKG="-${K8S_VERSION}-0"
        INSTALL_CMD="yum install -y kubelet${VERSION_PKG} kubeadm${VERSION_PKG} kubectl${VERSION_PKG} --disableexcludes=kubernetes"
        echo "将安装 Kubernetes 指定版本: ${K8S_VERSION}"
    else
        INSTALL_CMD="yum install -y kubelet kubeadm kubectl --disableexcludes=kubernetes"
        echo "未指定 Kubernetes 版本，将安装最新可用版本。"
    fi

    # 2. 执行安装，如果失败，进行容错 (切换到官方源)
    INSTALL_SUCCESS=0
    if ${INSTALL_CMD}; then
        INSTALL_SUCCESS=1
    else
        echo "!!! 警告: 尝试阿里云源安装失败 ($?). 切换到官方 Google 源..."

        # 容错：切换到新的官方 pkgs.k8s.io 源
        # 使用提取出的 K8S_MAJOR_VERSION 构造源路径
        K8S_OFFICIAL_REPO_URL="https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v${K8S_MAJOR_VERSION}/rpm/"
        K8S_OFFICIAL_GPG_KEY="https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v${K8S_MAJOR_VERSION}/rpm/repodata/repomd.xml.key"

        cat <<EOF > ${K8S_REPO_FILE}
[kubernetes]
name=Kubernetes (Official - ${K8S_MAJOR_VERSION})
baseurl=${K8S_OFFICIAL_REPO_URL}

EOF

        yum clean all
        yum makecache

        # 再次尝试安装

#!/bin/bash
set -e
LOG_FILE="/tmp/k8s_install.log"
exec > >(tee -a ${LOG_FILE}) 2>&1

# 接收环境变量 K8S_VERSION，用于安装指定版本
K8S_VERSION=${K8S_VERSION:-""}

# ==================================================
# [新增函数] 检查并安装指定的包 (仅限 CentOS/RHEL)
# ==================================================
install_if_missing() {
    local package=$1
    if ! command -v "$package" &> /dev/null; then
        echo ">>> 警告: $package 未找到，正在尝试安装..."
        if yum install -y "$package"; then
            echo ">>> $package 安装成功。"
        else
            echo "!!! 致命错误: $package 安装失败，退出脚本。"
            exit 1
        fi
    fi
}

echo ">>> [0/6] 检查依赖工具 (wget)..."
if [ -f /etc/redhat-release ]; then
    install_if_missing wget
else
    echo "非 CentOS/RHEL 系统，跳过依赖检查..."
fi

echo ">>> [1/6] 修复 CentOS 7 EOL 源问题 (切换阿里云源)..."
# 检测是否为 CentOS 7
if grep -q "CentOS Linux 7" /etc/release 2>/dev/null || grep -q "CentOS Linux release 7" /etc/redhat-release 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "检测到 CentOS 7，正在替换废弃的官方源为阿里云镜像..."

    # 1. 备份旧源
    #if [ ! -f /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo.backup ]; then
     #   mv /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo.backup || true
    #fi

    # 2. 下载阿里云源 (如果 curl 失败，尝试用 wget)
   # curl -o /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo https://mirrors.aliyun.com/repo/Centos-7.repo || \
    #wget -O /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo https://mirrors.aliyun.com/repo/Centos-7.repo

    # 3. 容错处理：如果下载失败，尝试修改本地配置指向 vault
    #if [ ! -f /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo ]; then
    #    echo "下载失败，尝试修改本地配置..."
    #    [ -f /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo.backup ] && cp /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo.backup /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo
    #    sed -i 's/mirrorlist/#mirrorlist/g' /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo
    #    sed -i 's|#baseurl=http://mirror.centos.org|baseurl=http://mirrors.aliyun.com/centos-vault|g' /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo
    #fi

    # 4. 生成缓存
    #yum clean all
    #yum makecache
else
    echo "非 CentOS 7 系统或未识别，跳过源修复..."
fi

echo ">>> [2/6] 初始化系统配置 (Swap/SELinux/Firewall)..."
swapoff -a
sed -i '/swap/d' /etc/fstab
setenforce 0 || true
sed -i 's/^SELINUX=enforcing$/SELINUX=permissive/' /etc/selinux/config || true
systemctl stop firewalld || true
systemctl disable firewalld || true

echo ">>> [3/6] 加载内核模块 & 参数..."
cat <<EOF | tee /etc/modules-load.d/k8s.conf
overlay
br_netfilter
EOF
modprobe overlay
modprobe br_netfilter

cat <<EOF | tee /etc/sysctl.d/k8s.conf
net.bridge.bridge-nf-call-iptables  = 1
net.bridge.bridge-nf-call-ip6tables = 1
net.ipv4.ip_forward                 = 1
EOF
sysctl --system

echo ">>> [4/6] 安装 Containerd (阿里云源)..."
if [ -f /etc/redhat-release ]; then
    # 安装依赖
    yum install -y yum-utils device-mapper-persistent-data lvm2

    # --- Docker 源配置及容错 START ---
    DOCKER_REPO_SUCCESS=0

    # 1. 尝试配置阿里云 Docker 源
    echo "尝试配置阿里云 Docker 源..."
    #if yum-config-manager --add-repo https://mirrors.aliyun.com/docker-ce/linux/centos/docker-ce.repo; then
    #    DOCKER_REPO_SUCCESS=1
    #    echo ">>> Docker 源配置: 使用阿里云源成功。"
    #else
    #    echo "!!! 警告: 阿里云 Docker 源配置失败。尝试切换到官方 Docker 源..."
#
    #    # 2. 容错：切换到官方 Docker 源
    #    if yum-config-manager --add-repo https://download.docker.com/linux/centos/docker-ce.repo; then
    #        DOCKER_REPO_SUCCESS=1
    #        echo ">>> Docker 源配置: 使用官方源成功。"
    #    else
    #        echo "!!! 致命错误: 官方 Docker 源配置也失败。退出安装 Containerd。"
    #        exit 1
    #    fi
    #fi
    # --- Docker 源配置及容错 END ---
    yum-config-manager --add-repo https://download.docker.com/linux/centos/docker-ce.repo
    # 3. 刷新缓存并安装 Containerd
    echo "尝试安装 containerd.io..."
    yum makecache # 确保最新的 repo metadata 被缓存

    INSTALL_CONTAINERD_CMD="yum install -y containerd.io"

    # [新增容错] 如果第一次安装失败 (可能是网络问题导致元数据下载中断)，清理缓存后再次尝试
    if ! ${INSTALL_CONTAINERD_CMD}; then
        echo "!!! 警告: Containerd 第一次安装失败。清理缓存后重试..."
        yum clean expire-cache # 清理过期的 repo 元数据
        yum makecache

        if ! ${INSTALL_CONTAINERD_CMD}; then
            echo "!!! 致命错误: Containerd 第二次安装失败，退出脚本。"
            exit 1
        fi
    fi

    mkdir -p /etc/containerd
    containerd config default > /etc/containerd/config.toml
    # 开启 SystemdCgroup
    sed -i 's/SystemdCgroup = false/SystemdCgroup = true/' /etc/containerd/config.toml
    # 使用阿里云镜像仓库加速 sandbox_image
    sed -i 's|registry.k8s.io|registry.aliyuncs.com/google_containers|g' /etc/containerd/config.toml

    systemctl restart containerd
    systemctl enable containerd
else
    echo "仅支持 CentOS/RHEL 系统自动安装，跳过 Containerd 安装..."
fi

echo ">>> [5/6] 安装 Kubeadm/Kubelet (阿里云源/官方源)..."
if [ -f /etc/redhat-release ]; then

    K8S_REPO_FILE="/etc/yum.repos.d/kubernetes.repo"

    # === 关键修改：提取主要版本号 (例如 1.30.14 -> 1.30) ===
    K8S_MAJOR_VERSION=""
    if [ -n "$K8S_VERSION" ]; then
        # 使用 grep -oE 提取 X.Y 部分
        K8S_MAJOR_VERSION=$(echo $K8S_VERSION | grep -oE '^[0-9]+\.[0-9]+')
        if [ -z "$K8S_MAJOR_VERSION" ]; then
            echo "!!! 警告: 无法从版本 $K8S_VERSION 提取主要版本，将使用完整版本作为源路径。"
            K8S_MAJOR_VERSION="$K8S_VERSION"
        fi
    fi
    # ======================================================


    # 1. 尝试配置阿里云 K8s 源
    echo "尝试配置阿里云 Kubernetes Yum 源..."
    cat <<EOF > ${K8S_REPO_FILE}
[kubernetes]
name=Kubernetes
baseurl=https://mirrors.aliyun.com/kubernetes/yum/repos/kubernetes-el7-x86_64/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0
repo_gpgcheck=0
EOF

    # 检查安装命令
    if [ -n "$K8S_VERSION" ]; then
        VERSION_PKG="-${K8S_VERSION}-0"
        INSTALL_CMD="yum install -y kubelet${VERSION_PKG} kubeadm${VERSION_PKG} kubectl${VERSION_PKG} --disableexcludes=kubernetes"
        echo "将安装 Kubernetes 指定版本: ${K8S_VERSION}"
    else
        INSTALL_CMD="yum install -y kubelet kubeadm kubectl --disableexcludes=kubernetes"
        echo "未指定 Kubernetes 版本，将安装最新可用版本。"
    fi

    # 2. 执行安装，如果失败，进行容错 (切换到官方源)
    INSTALL_SUCCESS=0
    if ${INSTALL_CMD}; then
        INSTALL_SUCCESS=1
    else
        echo "!!! 警告: 尝试阿里云源安装失败 ($?). 切换到官方 Google 源..."

        # 容错：切换到新的官方 pkgs.k8s.io 源
        # 使用提取出的 K8S_MAJOR_VERSION 构造源路径
        K8S_OFFICIAL_REPO_URL="https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v${K8S_MAJOR_VERSION}/rpm/"
        K8S_OFFICIAL_GPG_KEY="https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v${K8S_MAJOR_VERSION}/rpm/repodata/repomd.xml.key"

        cat <<EOF > ${K8S_REPO_FILE}
[kubernetes]
name=Kubernetes (Official - ${K8S_MAJOR_VERSION})
baseurl=${K8S_OFFICIAL_REPO_URL}
enabled=1
gpgcheck=1
repo_gpgcheck=1
gpgkey=${K8S_OFFICIAL_GPG_KEY}
exclude=kubelet kubeadm kubectl cri-tools kubernetes-cni
EOF

        yum clean all
        yum makecache

        # 再次尝试安装
        if ${INSTALL_CMD}; then
            INSTALL_SUCCESS=1
        else
            echo "!!! 错误: 尝试官方源安装也失败 ($?). 请检查网络和版本兼容性。"
            INSTALL_SUCCESS=0
        fi
    fi

    if [ ${INSTALL_SUCCESS} -eq 1 ]; then
        systemctl enable --now kubelet
    else
        # 安装失败，必须退出，防止后续 kubeadm join 失败
        echo "Kubernetes 组件安装失败，无法继续。"
        exit 1
    fi
fi

echo ">>> [6/6] 环境准备完成！"]0;root@test1:~[root@test1 ~]#

#!/bin/bash
set -e

# 定义 K8S 版本 (推荐使用 v1.28 或 v1.29，v1.30+ 在 CentOS 7 上可能有内核版本警告，但也能跑)
K8S_VERSION="v1.30"

echo "========================================================="
echo "   正在修复环境并安装 Kubernetes ${K8S_VERSION}"
echo "========================================================="

# -------------------------------------------------------
# 【关键步骤 1】: 暴力清理所有错误的 K8s 历史配置
# 这是为了解决 [Errno 14] curl#35 错误
# -------------------------------------------------------
echo "[1/8] 清理旧的、错误的仓库配置..."
rm -rf /etc/yum.repos.d/kubernetes.repo
rm -rf /etc/yum.repos.d/k8s.repo
# 清理 yum 缓存，防止残留
yum clean all

# -------------------------------------------------------
# 【关键步骤 2】: 修复 CentOS 7 EOL 源 (指向 Vault)
# CentOS 7 官方源已停止，必须换成 vault 归档源
# -------------------------------------------------------
echo "[2/8] 修复 CentOS 7 基础源 (Vault)..."
if [ ! -f /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo.backup ]; then
    cp /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo.backup || true
fi

# 重写 Base 源
cat <<EOF > /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo
[base]
name=CentOS-7 - Base
baseurl=http://vault.centos.org/7.9.2009/os/x86_64/
gpgcheck=1
gpgkey=file:///etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-CentOS-7

[updates]
name=CentOS-7 - Updates
baseurl=http://vault.centos.org/7.9.2009/updates/x86_64/
gpgcheck=1
gpgkey=file:///etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-CentOS-7

[extras]
name=CentOS-7 - Extras
baseurl=http://vault.centos.org/7.9.2009/extras/x86_64/
gpgcheck=1
gpgkey=file:///etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-CentOS-7
EOF

# -------------------------------------------------------
# 【关键步骤 3】: 修复 EPEL 源 (使用 HTTP 协议)
# 解决 SSL 握手失败问题
# -------------------------------------------------------
echo "[3/8] 安装基础工具并修复 EPEL 源..."
# 先尝试安装 wget，如果 yum 此时能用的话
yum install -y wget yum-utils device-mapper-persistent-data lvm2 || true

cat <<EOF > /etc/yum.repos.d/epel.repo
[epel]
name=Extra Packages for Enterprise Linux 7 - x86_64
baseurl=http://archives.fedoraproject.org/pub/archive/epel/7/x86_64/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=1
gpgkey=file:///etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-EPEL-7
EOF

# 刷新缓存，确保 yum 现在是健康的
echo "刷新 Yum 缓存..."
yum makecache fast

# -------------------------------------------------------
# 【步骤 4】: 系统环境初始化
# -------------------------------------------------------
echo "[4/8] 关闭防火墙/Swap/SELinux..."
systemctl stop firewalld || true
systemctl disable firewalld || true
setenforce 0 || true
sed -i 's/^SELINUX=enforcing$/SELINUX=disabled/' /etc/selinux/config
swapoff -a
sed -i '/swap/d' /etc/fstab

# -------------------------------------------------------
# 【步骤 5】: 配置内核模块
# -------------------------------------------------------
echo "[5/8] 配置内核参数..."
cat <<EOF | tee /etc/modules-load.d/k8s.conf
overlay
br_netfilter
EOF

modprobe overlay
modprobe br_netfilter

cat <<EOF | tee /etc/sysctl.d/k8s.conf
net.bridge.bridge-nf-call-iptables  = 1
net.bridge.bridge-nf-call-ip6tables = 1
net.ipv4.ip_forward                 = 1
EOF
sysctl --system

# -------------------------------------------------------
# 【步骤 6】: 安装 Containerd
# -------------------------------------------------------
echo "[6/8] 安装 Containerd..."
yum-config-manager --add-repo https://download.docker.com/linux/centos/docker-ce.repo
yum install -y containerd.io

echo "配置 Containerd SystemdCgroup..."
mkdir -p /etc/containerd
containerd config default > /etc/containerd/config.toml
# 修改 SystemdCgroup = true
sed -i 's/SystemdCgroup = false/SystemdCgroup = true/g' /etc/containerd/config.toml
# 修改 sandbox 镜像为阿里云 (加速国内下载)
sed -i 's|registry.k8s.io/pause:3.6|registry.aliyuncs.com/google_containers/pause:3.9|g' /etc/containerd/config.toml
sed -i 's|registry.k8s.io/pause:3.8|registry.aliyuncs.com/google_containers/pause:3.9|g' /etc/containerd/config.toml

systemctl restart containerd
systemctl enable containerd

# -------------------------------------------------------
# 【关键步骤 7】: 配置新的 Kubernetes 源 (pkgs.k8s.io)
# -------------------------------------------------------
echo "[7/8] 配置 Kubernetes ${K8S_VERSION} 官方源..."
cat <<EOF | tee /etc/yum.repos.d/kubernetes.repo
[kubernetes]
name=Kubernetes
baseurl=https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/${K8S_VERSION}/rpm/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=1
gpgkey=https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/${K8S_VERSION}/rpm/repodata/repomd.xml.key
exclude=kubelet kubeadm kubectl cri-tools kubernetes-cni
EOF

# -------------------------------------------------------
# 【步骤 8】: 安装 K8s 组件
# -------------------------------------------------------
echo "[8/8] 安装 Kubeadm, Kubelet, Kubectl..."
yum install -y kubelet kubeadm kubectl --disableexcludes=kubernetes
systemctl enable --now kubelet
